match.userMessage: Camera tracks forward at eye level with handheld micro-movement as Scarlett walks along the Bondi shoreline holding the coral lipstick tube loosely at her side. Ocean waves roll behind her. She pauses, crouches down, and presses the tube into damp sand beside her bare foot as a small wave rushes in and recedes. Scarlett stands, brushes sand from the tube with her thumb, and lifts it toward camera in a steady close-up that highlights the coral surface under late-afternoon light. She twists the base to retract the bullet, then slips the tube into her tote before continuing to walk along the water's edge.
